source.manual: MoWT Road Design Manual Vol 3 Part I

description: Subgrade class designations by CBR ranges for pavement design catalogue entry
notes: CBR values are design CBR from 10th percentile method (Section 3.3)
Use soaked CBR for wet conditions, unsoaked or dried-back CBR for dry conditions per Table 3.2
Minimum depth is the depth below pavement to which the design subgrade strength must be confirmed
